nodes.label: Portal de Convocatorias Publicas (MVP)
nodes.rationale: MVP to explore, filter and bookmark Colombian SECOP I public-tender data; tender data is fetched live, not persisted, so only user data lives in SQLite.

nodes.label: bookmarks table
nodes.rationale: snapshot_json stores title, entity, value and date at save time so the bookmark survives changes/removals in SECOP (D6).

nodes.label: busquedas table
nodes.rationale: criteria_json serializes the normalized filter model so saved searches need no migration when the external source translation changes.

nodes.label: better-sqlite3 persistence
nodes.rationale: synchronous and simple; accessed with versioned migrations (0001_init).

nodes.label: TenderSource port
nodes.rationale: Domain interface search(criteria)/getByNoticeUid(uid); core depends on the interface not concrete HTTP, enabling tests without network and source substitution.

nodes.label: SodaTenderSource adapter
nodes.rationale: Primary discovery adapter; translates normalized filters to SODA $q/$where/$order/$limit/$offset with validated, escaped values (anti-injection).

nodes.label: CromaEnrichmentSource adapter
nodes.rationale: Optional detail enrichment by notice_uid, feature-flagged by CROMA_API_KEY; cannot discover tenders so it is used only for detail, its failure never breaks base detail.

nodes.label: Normalized filter model
nodes.rationale: Stable filter contract (q, entidad, departamento, modalidad, valorMin/Max, fechaDesde/Hasta, estado, orden, page, pageSize) that decouples client and saved searches from SODA syntax and lets the source change without breaking persisted busquedas.

nodes.label: JWT authentication (HS256)
nodes.rationale: bcrypt/argon2 password hash; login emits short-lived signed access token (sub=user_id) validated by a preHandler hook; MVP has no refresh tokens; stateless suits SPA+API.

nodes.label: Hexagonal architecture
nodes.rationale: Core use cases depend on the TenderSource port, never concrete HTTP; explicit boundaries give testability and source substitution over faster-but-untestable direct SODA calls in handlers.

nodes.label: In-memory TTL cache and graceful degradation
nodes.rationale: TTL cache (~60s search, 300s detail) keyed by criteria/uid; on upstream timeout serve stale if valid else typed 502/504.
nodes.norm_label: in-memory ttl cache and graceful degradation

nodes.label: Project tech-stack constraints
nodes.rationale: Fixed partner constraints: Fastify+TS API, React+Vite web, better-sqlite3, exactly three domain tables, hexagonal TenderSource boundary, JWT HS256; Spanish domain/DB terms, English everything else.
